title: Support TactusScore reasoning and verbosity controls
description:
Enable Plexus TactusScore YAML to configure GPT-5-family reasoning_effort and verbosity through the Tactus runtime.

Definition of Done:
- Top-level TactusScore reasoning_effort and verbosity reach Tactus LLM calls.
- Defaults remain provider/model defaults when values are omitted.
- Invalid values are rejected.
- Targeted tests pass.
